title: Mid-Level Radiologist at 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies:
3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies!
